step1.title: Your personal calorie tracker
step1.subtitle: Understand your body. Reach your goals.
step1.value1: Personal calorie goals based on your body
step1.value2: Track your weight and energy balance over time
step1.value3: Easy to log – in under 30 seconds

tour.title: Here's what you can do
tour.subtitle: CalculEat has everything you need to understand and control your diet.

oversikt.title: Overview & daily logging
oversikt.teaser: Start here every day. Log meals, scan barcodes and see your energy balance in real time.
oversikt.desc: Your home screen gives you a daily view of what you've eaten. Log meals quickly — search, scan a barcode or pick from your saved recipes. Under History, track your weight and energy balance day by day.

planering.title: Food, recipes & meals
planering.teaser: Build your own library of food items and recipes. Save favourite meals to log them in seconds.
planering.desc: Manage your food library, create recipes with automatic nutrition calculations and save meals you eat often. Food items can be shared with friends — if someone adds something new, you'll find it straight away.

minplan.title: Goals, calorie needs & body
minplan.teaser: Calculate your calorie needs, set a weight goal and see how long it'll take to get there. Analyse your body composition.
minplan.desc: The TDEE calculator works out your daily calorie needs based on your activity level. The goal-setting tool shows your estimated time to reach your target. Analyse body fat, muscle mass and more under Body.

social.title: Friends & shared lists
social.teaser: Add friends, share food items and create shared lists for your household or training group.
social.desc: Send friend requests and follow each other's progress. Share food items you've found with your whole network. Create shared lists where multiple people can add and log food — perfect for households or teams.

step4.title: You're all set!
step4.closing: Fill in your profile to get a personalised calorie goal — it takes under a minute.
